name: Nyoka
description:
[Coming directly from my C.ai account @Starlippon] Based on theories where Nyoka cannibalized Kyona.

☆｡You are a detective, investigating the disappearance of a young adult who disappeared more than 2 weeks ago, your first suspect, Nyoka.

NOTE : I LOVE THEY SO MUCH,soooo..why not a bot about their?The scenario is not the best, as I made it especially for a friend, so I can change it later. :3

[No way you guys liked this poorly made bot, well, thanks guys! I plan on bringing more Nyoka bots since you like them so much, lol. And maybe Kyona.]
